title: Wynntils Upgraded Fabric
description: Wynntils is a mod designed to enhance the user experience of Wynncraft. The mods in this modpack seek to further enhance the user experience of Wynncraft through performance and visual enhancement mods.
body:
Wynntils is a mod designed to enhance the user experience of Wynncraft. The mods in this modpack seek to further enhance the user experience of Wynncraft through performance and visual enhancement mods. Now including Complimentary Shaders!

Thank you to Complimentary Shaders for allowing me to use them in this modpack! More information on these shaders can be found here https://www.complementary.dev/shaders/

Server IP: play.wynncraft.net

All settings are on default.

Mod List 

- Chat Heads:  Adds player heads next to chat messages.

- Iris Shaders: Allows use of shaders on Fabric!

- EMF: Adds support for Optifine's Custom Entity Models

- ETF: Adds new Entity Texture Features!

- BadOptimizations: A collection of mostly micro optimizations that add up to something bigger!

- BetterGrassify: Adds Optifine's fast and fancy grass options.
  
- Better Third Person: Adds independent rotation of the camera in third person.

- Bobby: Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance setting.

- Continuity: Continuity is a Fabric mod that allows resource packs that use the OptiFine connected textures format.

- Controlling: Adds the ability to search for keybinds using their name in the KeyBinding menu, this allows players to easily find a key binding in the menu.

- CraftPresence: Completely customize the way others see you play Minecraft via Discord's Rich Presence API & the DiscordIPC API by jagrosh!

- Debugify: Debugify is a project that fixes over 70 bugs found on the bug tracker in Minecraft. (and does nothing more!)

- Dynamic FPS: Reduce resource usage while Minecraft is in the background or idle.

- Entity Culling Fabric/Forge: Using async path-tracing to skip rendering Block/Entities that are not visible.

- Euphoria Patches: An add-on for Complementary Shaders (Reimagined and Unbound), developed by SpacEagle17 and isuewo.

- Falling leaves: Adds a neat little particle effect to leaf blocks.

- FerriteCore: Reduced memory usage

- FPS Reducer: This mod reduces unnecessary GPU and CPU load by reducing the frame rate automatically when the client window is inactive.

- Fusion: Fusion is a library which adds texture and model types such as connected textures to be used in resource packs and other mods.

- ImmediatelyFast: ImmediatelyFast is an open source Minecraft mod which improves the immediate mode rendering performance of the client.

- Iris: Allows shader use on fabric.

- Iris/Oculus & GeckoLib Compat: Fixes GeckoLib entities' animations not working while using shaderpacks that have entity shadows.

- Item Highlighter: Quickly find new items by showing an animated star on all newly-picked up items.

- Lithium: Lithium is a general-purpose optimization mod for Minecraft, which works to improve a number of systems (game physics, mob AI, block ticking, etc.)

- Mod Menu: Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.

- Model Gap Fix: Fixes small gaps in item and block models

- ModernFix: ModernFix is an all-in-one mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs in modern Minecraft versions

- No Chat Reports: Makes chat unreportable where possible.

- Not Enough Animations: Adds first person animations to the third person camera.

- ParticleCore: Particle Optimizations

- Puzzle: Adds resourcepack features and a GUI to more conveniently configure OptiFine alternatives.

- Skin Layers 3D: Replaces the usually flat second layer of player skins with a 3d modeled version. Will automatically switch to the vanilla 2d rendering when players are further away than 12 blocks in order to increase the framerate. Also supports transparent parts on things like glasses!

- Sodium: Sodium is a powerful rendering engine and optimization mod for the Minecraft client, which improves frame rates and reduces micro-stutter, while fixing many graphical issues in Minecraft.

- Sound Physics Remastered: A Minecraft mod that provides realistic sound attenuation reverberation, and absorption through blocks.

- Spark: A performance profiler for clients, servers, and proxies.
  
- The Open Sauce Toast Killer: Gets rid of toasts.

- Transparent: Allows resource packs to make certain entities support transparency.

- Wynntils: https://wynntils.com/

- Zoomify: Zoomify aims to provide the easiest, most configurable and most sexy looking zo
